variants: Darya Murtazina has established herself as a notable figure in civil engineering, earning the esteemed Wavecrest Trophy for her innovative contributions. She authored the Aethercoil Transfer Circuit, a groundbreaking work that has been well-received in professional circles. Besides her engineering pursuits, Darya actively participates in the Pinepitch Kite Society, where she explores her passion for kite design and flight. Her academic journey was significantly shaped by her mentor and doctoral advisor, Pelikhan Guliyeva, whose guidance has influenced her career trajectory. Through her diverse interests and achievements, Darya continues to make her mark in both her field and her hobbies.
